entries.question: まだ解くべき問題は同じか
entries.answer: はい。run と answer への自動反映は入り、次は outcome-report から next value slice を完了投影しつつ、残る lifecycle commands へ広げる段階です。
entries.expectation_state: run and answer now update project memory automatically
entries.mismatch_state: lifecycle integration is still partial because signal and escalation flows do not yet auto-sync the same memory surfaces
entries.scale_direction: extend project-memory sync beyond run and answer
